metadata.title: HockeyRinkAPI Backend Refactor — SOLID + Repository Pattern
metadata.description: Phased plan to bring HockeyRinkAPI into full compliance with SOLID principles and introduce the Repository pattern for testable, maintainable data access.

decisions_confirmed.phase3_mock_stripe: DELETE MockStripeService.cs (Option A) — MockPaymentService already fulfils the same role and correctly implements IPaymentService.
decisions_confirmed.route_preservation: All admin controller splits (Phase 6) keep exact [Route('api/admin/...')] routes to avoid breaking the Angular frontend.
decisions_confirmed.test_strategy: Keep existing integration tests (CustomWebApplicationFactory + InMemoryDatabase) unchanged. Add new unit tests alongside using Moq — do NOT rewrite existing tests.
decisions_confirmed.execution_start: Phase 1 — ITokenService extraction (safest, highest impact, unblocks all other phases).

SRP: AdminController owns 15+ endpoints across 6 unrelated domains (users, sessions, registrations, leagues, dashboard, draft).
Token validation logic (ValidateTokenAsync + GetUserIdFromTokenAsync) is copy-pasted into AdminController, UsersController, SessionsController, TeamsController, and AuthController — 5 copies.
IsAdminAsync() is duplicated in AdminController and TeamsController.
Session auto-activate/deactivate business logic lives inside AdminController.GetAllSessions() AND SessionsController.GetSessions() — 2 copies.

7 request model classes (CreateSessionModel, UpdateSessionModel, ManualRegistrationModel, UpdateLeagueModel, UpdatePlayerRatingModel, UpdateUserProfileModel, PublishDraftModel) are defined inline at the bottom of AdminController.cs instead of Models/Requests/.
OCP: Session activation/deactivation rules are hardcoded inside controller action methods — adding a new rule requires modifying a controller.
LSP: MockStripeService does NOT implement IPaymentService — it defines its own incompatible PaymentResult type vs PaymentResponse in IPaymentService.
SessionsController takes a concrete MockStripeService constructor parameter alongside IPaymentService, breaking substitutability.
violations_identified.ISP: No violations — IPaymentService is already small and focused.
DIP: All controllers inject AppDbContext directly — no repository abstraction.
SessionsController has a concrete MockStripeService constructor dependency.
AdminController and TeamsController implement their own IsAdminAsync() instead of using an injected abstraction.

phases.name: Extract ITokenService
phases.goal: Eliminate token validation and generation code duplicated across 5 controllers by centralising it behind a single injectable interface.
phases.risk: Low — pure extraction, no logic change
files_modified: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/AuthController.cs — inject ITokenService; replace GenerateToken() + ValidateTokenAsync(); remove private methods
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/UsersController.cs — inject ITokenService; replace all ValidateTokenAsync + GetUserIdFromTokenAsync calls; remove private methods
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/SessionsController.cs — inject ITokenService; replace ValidateTokenAsync + GetUserIdFromTokenAsync; remove private methods
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/AdminController.cs — inject ITokenService; update IsAdminAsync() to use _tokenService; remove private GetUserIdFromTokenAsync
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/TeamsController.cs — inject ITokenService; update IsAdminAsync() to use _tokenService; remove private GetUserIdFromTokenAsync
phases.checkpoint: Run full test suite — all existing tests must pass after this phase.

phases.name: Extract ISessionActivationService
phases.goal: Remove the ~60-line session auto-activate/deactivate foreach loop duplicated in AdminController.GetAllSessions() and SessionsController.GetSessions().
phases.risk: Low — logic is identical between both controllers, just extracted
files_modified: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/AdminController.cs — inject ISessionActivationService; replace foreach block in GetAllSessions() with: var changed = await _sessionActivationService.ApplyActivationRulesAsync(sessions); if (changed) await _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();

ISessionActivationService: Task<bool> ApplyActivationRulesAsync(IEnumerable<Session> sessions) — returns true if any sessions were modified

phases.checkpoint: Manually verify via Swagger that session activation/deactivation still works correctly.

phases.name: Fix MockStripeService LSP/DIP Violation
phases.goal: Remove MockStripeService so SessionsController can drop its concrete dependency. MockPaymentService already correctly implements IPaymentService.
phases.risk: Low — SessionsController already has IPaymentService injected; this just removes the unused concrete one
files_modified: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/SessionsController.cs — remove private readonly MockStripeService _stripeService field and constructor parameter
phases.checkpoint: Run session registration end-to-end via Swagger to verify payment flow still works.

phases.name: Move Request Models to Models/Requests
phases.goal: Remove the 7 model classes defined at the bottom of AdminController.cs and place each in its own file under Models/Requests/.
phases.risk: Low — rename namespace + move files only; class names stay the same
files_modified: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/AdminController.cs — delete the 7 inline class definitions at the bottom; add using HockeyRinkAPI.Models.Requests;
phases.checkpoint: dotnet build must have zero errors.

phases.name: Introduce Repository Pattern
phases.goal: Abstract all direct AppDbContext calls behind repository interfaces so controllers depend on abstractions, enabling true unit testing without InMemoryDatabase.
phases.risk: Medium — touches all controllers; build after each repository to catch errors early
notes: UserManager<ApplicationUser> already serves as an adequate user repository — do NOT wrap it.
Keep AppDbContext registered in DI — repositories take it as a constructor dependency.
Use AddScoped lifetime for all repositories to match DbContext lifetime.
files_modified: HockeyRinkAPI/Program.cs — register all 4 repositories with AddScoped
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/SessionsController.cs — replace _dbContext calls with ISessionRepository, IRegistrationRepository, IPaymentRepository
phases.checkpoint: Run full test suite — integration tests still use InMemoryDatabase so they should still pass.

phases.name: Split AdminController into Domain Controllers
phases.goal: Apply SRP by splitting AdminController's 15+ endpoints across 5 focused controllers under Controllers/Admin/.
phases.risk: Medium — URL routes must stay identical to avoid breaking the Angular frontend (confirmed)
files_created: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/Admin/AdminControllerBase.cs — abstract base: injects ITokenService + UserManager; exposes protected IsAdminAsync()
HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/Admin/AdminUsersController.cs — GET api/admin/users, PUT api/admin/users/{userId}/rating, PUT api/admin/users/{userId}/profile
files_deleted: HockeyRinkAPI/Controllers/AdminController.cs — delete once all endpoints verified and all tests pass
phases.checkpoint: Run full test suite AND manually hit every api/admin/* endpoint via Swagger to confirm routes are unchanged.

phases.name: Add Unit Tests with Moq
phases.goal: Add true unit tests for the new services and split controllers using Moq interface mocks — no database required.
phases.risk: Low — test project only; no production code changes
phases.decision: Keep existing integration tests (CustomWebApplicationFactory + InMemoryDatabase) as-is. Only ADD new unit tests (confirmed).
files_created: HockeyRinkApi.Tests/Unit/TokenServiceTests.cs — test GenerateToken, ValidateTokenAsync (expired, invalid base64, wrong email, valid round-trip), GetUserIdFromTokenAsync
HockeyRinkApi.Tests/Unit/SessionActivationServiceTests.cs — test auto-activate, auto-deactivate, manual override detection
HockeyRinkApi.Tests/Unit/AdminSessionsControllerTests.cs — mock ISessionRepository + ISessionActivationService + ITokenService; no HTTP server
example_unit_test_pattern: var controller = new AdminSessionsController(mockRepo.Object, mockActivation.Object, mockToken.Object, mockUserManager, mockLogger);
phases.checkpoint: All unit tests must pass without any database.

testing_checkpoints: Phase 1 complete: run dotnet test — all existing tests must still pass
Phase 2 complete: verify session activation/deactivation via Swagger manually
Phase 3 complete: verify session registration + payment flow end-to-end via Swagger
Phase 4 complete: dotnet build must have zero errors
Phase 5 complete: run dotnet test — all integration tests still pass
Phase 6 complete: run dotnet test AND manually hit every api/admin/* route via Swagger
Phase 7 complete: unit tests pass without any database
